mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, seller_id, business_name, seller_status, tier, total_products, total_orders_30d, gmv_30d, rating, health_score, fulfillment_rate, return_rate, cancellation_rate, on_time_dispatch_rate, avg_response_time_hrs ) SELECT s.id, s.tenant, NOW(), s.id, s.business_name, s.state_id, COALESCE(s.tier, 'STANDARD'), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_product.products p WHERE p.supplier_id = s.id AND p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED'), 0), COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_order.orders o WHERE o.seller_id = s.id AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0), COALESCE((SELECT SUM(o.total_amount) FROM hm_order.orders o WHERE o.seller_id = s.id AND o.state_id NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') AND o.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0), COALESCE((SELECT AVG(r.rating) * 100 FROM hm_review.product_reviews r JOIN hm_product.products p ON r.product_id = p.id WHERE p.supplier_id = s.id AND r.state_id = 'PUBLISHED')::INT, 0), COALESCE(s.health_score, 500), COALESCE(s.fulfillment_rate, 0), COALESCE(s.return_rate, 0), COALESCE(s.cancellation_rate, 0), COALESCE(s.on_time_dispatch_rate, 0), COALESCE(s.avg_response_time_hrs, 0) FROM hm_supplier.supplier s WHERE s.state_id NOT IN ('DEACTIVATED', 'BANNED')
